name: NIST AI RMF: GOVERN — Risk Policies In Place
description: AI risk management policies and processes are in place and applied across the AI lifecycle.
rationale: NIST AI RMF GOVERN 1: policies, processes, procedures and practices for mapping, measuring and managing AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
